author: ABC News YouTube
text:
Dog runs onto pitch during soccer game
An energetic dog ran onto the pitch and temporarily halted play in Paraguay’s final match ahead of the FIFA World Cup as they took on Nicaragua. 

Security personnel entered the playing field and managed to carefully lift the dog out, local media reported. #dog #animals #soccer
